title: oxalis pilulifera
intro: Oxalis pilulifera, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family and is native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Oxalis pilulifera include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Oxalis pilulifera is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be consumed as a vegetable or used in herbal infusions.
